assertions.title: Share button works from bingo state

steps.observed: Game page loaded with 25 unmarked squares

steps.action: Mark all 5 squares in row 1 (indices 0-4) via JS eval
Set up clipboard interceptor and click Share button
steps.expected: URL copied to clipboard despite celebration

assertions.title: Share button does not alter board state

steps.action: Capture board state before clicking Share (5 marked squares in row 1)

steps.observed: Board state identical after click: statesMatch=true, changedIndices=[]

assertions.title: Share button handles clipboard failure gracefully

steps.action: Override navigator.clipboard.writeText to throw error, remove navigator.share
steps.expected: Clipboard API will fail on next share

steps.observed: Button text changed to 'Could not copy' with error styling (red border/background)
Mobile layout displayed with Share button visible

steps.action: Set up clipboard interceptor (no navigator.share available on desktop emulation)

assertions.title: Share mid-game, open in new tab, continue independently

steps.action: Clear marks and reload page, then mark 3 squares (indices 0, 1, 2)
Open captured URL in new tab
steps.expected: New tab shows same board, all unmarked
steps.observed: New tab shows same board text layout, all 25 squares unmarked (markedCount=0, allUnmarked=true)
Board texts are identical across both tabs (same seed determinism)

steps.action: Mark square index 5 in Tab 2, then check Tab 1
steps.observed: Tab 1 still has exactly 3 marked squares [0,1,2] — independent from Tab 2

summary: Tested 5 assertions: all 5 passed. VAL-SH-006 (share during bingo) ✅, VAL-SH-007 (share doesn't alter board) ✅, VAL-SH-008 (clipboard failure graceful) ✅, VAL-SH-009 (mobile share) ✅, VAL-XF-002 (share mid-game, new tab independent) ✅
